---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for slowlog-agent
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem would this solve?**
A clear description of the problem — what are you trying to do that
slowlog-agent doesn't support today?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried.

**Is this in scope?**
slowlog-agent is deliberately on-demand only (see the README's non-goals):
no scheduler/cron, no web UI, no auto-applying DDL, no write access
anywhere. Please note if your request fits within that, or explain why it's
worth reconsidering.
